title: ICARION Boundary Configuration
description: Ion-boundary interaction behavior when ions hit domain walls

type.description: Boundary action type: Absorption (ion removed), SpecularReflection (elastic bounce), DiffuseReflection (cosine-weighted + partial thermalization), ThermalReflection (Maxwell-Boltzmann re-emission)

accommodation_coeff.description: Energy accommodation coefficient [0,1]. 0=fully elastic (specular), 1=fully thermal. Used for DiffuseReflection: v_out = (1-α)*v_in + α*v_thermal

temperature_K.description: Wall temperature [K] for thermal/diffuse reflection. If omitted, uses domain environment temperature
